positive: A minimalist and whimsical design featuring a stylized fox surrounded by celestial elements. The fox is depicted in a clean, elegant silhouette, sitting gracefully amongst abstract crescent moons, scattered stars, and stylized constellations. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, muted gold, and burnt orange. The composition should be centered and highly detailed, maintaining clean lines suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Flat vector illustration style meets cosmic etching. Highly contrasted, perfect for fabric printing, central focus.
negative: blur, low detail, noise, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, grainy, muddy colors, messy lines, cluttered background
